untranslatable_reason: Signal requires P/E ratio comparisons (stock P/E vs S&P 500 P/E) and CANSLIM criteria validation. P/E ratios and fundamental screening criteria are not available in the allowed indicators list, which contains only price action, technical indicators, and volume metrics. The relative valuation anchor (S&P 500 P/E as multiplier) cannot be expressed using available indicators.
translation_notes: This signal is fundamentally a value/relative valuation strategy requiring access to P/E ratio data and multi-stock comparative analysis. The CANSLIM requirement adds further fundamental criteria screening not expressible in technical indicator language. A functional implementation would require custom data loaders for fundamental metrics and index-relative calculations.
